docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHOUEKANI, AYMAN AS TO DEFENDANT WOFFORD, CONSUELLO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-16-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-14-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-28-1998
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-22-1998 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-22-1998, OFF CALENDAR SEPTEMBER 22, 1998 POS, OSC

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-16-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR DEFAULT; OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY ELLIS SEAN HEARING SET FOR NOV-24-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-24-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE; OBTAIN ANSWER AND OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT; TO DESIGNATE CASE AS UM. OSC AND SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY ELLIS SEAN WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-09-1998 CONTINUED FROM NOV-24-1998 TO DEC-30-1998 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHOUEKANI, AYMAN

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-30-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE; TO PAY SANCTIONS IMPOSED; OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY ELLIS SEAN HEARING SET FOR FEB-03-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-03-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $300.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-03-1999, TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE; OBTAIN ANSWER AND OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT; OSC AND SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY ELLIS SEAN WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-18-1999 CONTINUED FROM FEB-03-1999 TO MAR-31-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-31-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $300.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-31-1999, TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE; OBTAIN ANSWER AND OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT; OSC AND SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY ELLIS SEAN WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-15-1999 CONTINUED FROM MAR-31-1999 TO MAY-12-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-12-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $300.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAY-12-1999, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT AND OBTAIN DEF. JUDGMT. OSC AND SANCTION TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SEAN ELLIS., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-27-1999 CONTINUED FROM MAY-12-1999 TO JUN-30-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-30-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUN-30-1999, SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY SEAN ELLIS FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS,OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. DEFAULT CANNOT BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-15-1999 CONTINUED FROM JUN-30-1999 TO AUG-25-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-25-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-25-1999, TO FILE POS; OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ELLIS SEAN, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-09-1999 CONTINUED FROM AUG-25-1999 TO OCT-27-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-27-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-27-1999, TO FILE POS; OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ELLIS SEAN, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING. NO ENTRY OF DEAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-12-1999 CONTINUED FROM OCT-27-1999 TO JAN-19-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-19-2000, TO FILE POS; OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ELLIS SEAN, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-03-2000 CONTINUED FROM JAN-19-2000 TO MAR-15-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-15-2000, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ELLIS SEAN, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-30-2000 CONTINUED FROM MAR-15-2000 TO MAY-31-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAY-31-2000, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY SEAN ELLIS, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-15-2000 CONTINUED FROM MAY-31-2000 TO AUG-30-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-30-2000, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. OSC AND FURTHER SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ELLIS SEAN, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-14-2000 CONTINUED FROM AUG-30-2000 TO DEC-13-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-13-2000, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND FURTHER SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY SEAN ELLIS, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-01-2001 CONTINUED FROM DEC-13-2000 TO JAN-31-2001 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-31-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-31-2001, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND FURTHER SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ELLIS SEAN, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-15-2001 CONTINUED FROM JAN-31-2001 TO SEP-05-2001 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-05-2001, DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CCP 583.250 FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP 583.210.
